title: Dashboard Runtime Config
description: Per-tester runtime configuration consumed by Dashboard executor and transfer-class test scripts. Stored at shared/runtime-config.json. Owned by: Dashboard UI (read/write). Only used by Transfer tests at this stage; other modules (Swap / DeFi / etc.) will get their own config entries when needed.

walletAccounts.description: Two wallet accounts that any transfer test may use. Default direction: primary -> secondary. If primary balance is insufficient at runtime, scripts may swap roles (primary becomes receiver, secondary becomes sender). Addresses are NOT stored here — they are derived per-chain by scripts at runtime from the chosen account.

walletName.description: Parent wallet display name in OneKey (e.g. '我的助记词钱包').

accountName.description: Account name within the wallet shown in OneKey AccountSelector (e.g. 'Account #1').
